runtime_dependencies.role: GPL Miles SDK compatibility runtime for the private Project Tempest demo
runtime_dependencies.build_context: modern parent MSVC Win32 Release build through cmake/miles.cmake (Generals and GeneralsMD contexts)
runtime_dependencies.hash_record: the exact proven DLL SHA-256 is written to package-manifest.json and SHA256SUMS.txt

assets.role: internal concept and Blender blockout reference
assets.subject: Courier scout vehicle
assets.prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game vehicle concept sheet for a real-time strategy unit, intended as the modelling reference for Blender
Primary request: design the Freegrid Courier, a compact four-wheeled cyberpunk scout vehicle made by a neighbourhood power collective in 2089 from an obsolete municipal electrical-maintenance cart
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral charcoal-grey industrial design-sheet background, no environment
Subject: one consistent vehicle shown in a large high three-quarter RTS camera view plus smaller front, side, rear, and top orthographic views; low rugged chassis; four clearly separated wheels; asymmetric repaired body panels; exposed insulated power cables; a folding sensor mast; compact battery bank; practical tow and repair points; no driver visible; no large weapon
Style/medium: highly resolved AAA game vehicle concept art with believable industrial design, suitable for hard-surface 3D modelling; crisp shapes and production annotations expressed visually without written labels
Composition/framing: landscape concept sheet, complete vehicle visible in every view, generous spacing, accurate proportions shared across all views, silhouette readable at normal RTS camera distance
Lighting/mood: controlled studio lighting that reveals planes and materials; grounded, utilitarian, rain-worn, quietly defiant rather than glossy or luxurious
Color palette: oxidised dark steel, worn warm off-white, safety amber panels, restrained cyan status lights; avoid purple-and-pink neon cliché
Materials/textures: chipped paint, wet grime in seams, rubber tyres, ceramic insulators, brushed repair plates, visible bolts and cable clamps
Constraints: original design; consistent geometry across every view; strong top-down silhouette; plausible wheel clearance and steering; no logos, no trademarks, no readable text, no watermark, no people, no city scene, no flying parts, no tank tracks, no sports-car styling, no excessive greebles, no visual resemblance to any Command & Conquer vehicle
